nodes.x: This then was the lot of the tribe of the children of Judah by their families; even to the border of Edom the wilderness of Zin southward was the uttermost part of the south coast.
And the uttermost cities of the tribe of the children of Judah toward the coast of Edom southward were Kabzeel, and Eder, and Jagur,
¶ And the lot of the tribe of the children of Benjamin came up according to their families: and the coast of their lot came forth between the children of Judah and the children of Joseph.
And the west border was to the great sea, and the coast thereof. This is the coast of the children of Judah round about according to their families.

And the border was drawn thence, and compassed the corner of the sea southward, from the hill that lieth before Beth-horon southward; and the goings out thereof were at Kirjath-baal, which is Kirjath-jearim, a city of the children of Judah: this was the west quarter.

22. So Joshua took both Eleazar and the senate, and with them the heads
of the tribes, and distributed the land to the nine tribes, and to the
half-tribe of Manasseh, appointing the dimensions to be according to the
largeness of each tribe. So when he had cast lots, Judah had assigned
him by lot the upper part of Judea, reaching as far as Jerusalem, and
its breadth extended to the Lake of Sodom.…
And their south border was from the shore of the salt sea, from the bay that looketh southward:
And the border passed along to the side of Beth-hoglah northward: and the outgoings of the border were at the north bay of the salt sea at the south end of Jordan: this was the south coast.
And the east border was the salt sea, even unto the end of Jordan. And their border in the north quarter was from the bay of the sea at the uttermost part of Jordan:

And it came to pass that they did not head them until they had come to the borders of the land Desolation; and there they did head them, by the narrow pass which led by the sea into the land northward, yea, by the sea, on the west and on the east.
And the south side southward, from Tamar even to the waters of strife in Kadesh, the river to the great sea. And this is the south side southward.
And they came over unto the other side of the sea, into the country of the Gadarenes.
And it went out to the south side to Maaleh-acrabbim, and passed along to Zin, and ascended up on the south side unto Kadesh-barnea, and passed along to Hezron, and went up to Adar, and fetched a…

And your border shall turn from the south to the ascent of Akrabbim, and pass on to Zin: and the going forth thereof shall be from the south to Kadesh-barnea, and shall go on to Hazar-addar, and pass on to Azmon:

And the border compassed from Baalah westward unto mount Seir, and passed along unto the side of mount Jearim, which is Chesalon, on the north side, and went down to Beth-shemesh, and passed on to Timnah:

And then the coast turneth westward to Aznoth-tabor, and goeth out from thence to Hukkok, and reacheth to Zebulun on the south side, and reacheth to Asher on the west side, and to Judah upon Jordan toward the sunrising.
And from thence passeth on along on the east to Gittah-hepher, to Ittah-kazin, and goeth out to Remmon-methoar to Neah;

And the border went over from thence toward Luz, to the side of Luz, which is Beth-el, southward; and the border descended to Ataroth-adar, near the hill that lieth on the south side of the nether Beth-horon.
From thence it passed toward Azmon, and went out unto the river of Egypt; and the goings out of that coast were at the sea: this shall be your south coast.
And the border shall fetch a compass from Azmon unto the river of Egypt, and the goings out of it shall be at the sea.
And the coast shall go down from Shepham to Riblah, on the east side of Ain; and the border shall descend, and shall reach unto the side of the sea of Chinnereth eastward:

And it came to pass after we had all gone down into the ship, and had taken with us our provisions and things which had been commanded us, we did put forth into the sea and were driven forth before the wind towards the promised land.

And the border went up toward Debir from the valley of Achor, and so northward, looking toward Gilgal, that is before the going up to Adummim, which is on the south side of the river: and the border passed toward the waters of En-shemesh, and the goings out thereof were at En-rogel:
And the east border was the salt sea, even unto the end of Jordan. And their border in the north quarter was from the bay of the sea at the uttermost part of Jordan:
And Jordan was the border of it on the east side. This was the inheritance of the children of Benjamin, by the coasts thereof round about, according to their families.
And their south border was from the shore of the salt sea, from the bay that looketh southward:
And the border shall go down to Jordan, and the goings out of it shall be at the salt sea: this shall be your land with the coasts thereof round about.
And the east side ye shall measure from Hauran, and from Damascus, and from Gilead, and from the land of Israel by Jordan, from the border unto the east sea. And this is the east side.
And the border went up to Beth-hogla, and passed along by the north of Beth-arabah; and the border went up to the stone of Bohan the son of Reuben:

And their border on the north side was from Jordan; and the border went up to the side of Jericho on the north side, and went up through the mountains westward; and the goings out thereof were at the wilderness of Beth-aven.
And was drawn from the north, and went forth to En-shemesh, and went forth toward Geliloth, which is over against the going up of Adummim, and descended to the stone of Bohan the son of Reuben,
And by the border of Reuben, from the east side unto the west side, a portion for Judah.
And the border of the children of Reuben was Jordan, and the border thereof. This was the inheritance of the children of Reuben after their families, the cities and the villages thereof.
And the border went up toward Debir from the valley of Achor, and so northward, looking toward Gilgal, that is before the going up to Adummim, which is on the south side of the river: and the border…

And the border came down to the end of the mountain that lieth before the valley of the son of Hinnom, and which is in the valley of the giants on the north, and descended to the valley of Hinnom, to the side of Jebusi on the south, and descended to En-rogel,

And the border went up by the valley of the son of Hinnom unto the south side of the Jebusite; the same is Jerusalem: and the border went up to the top of the mountain that lieth before the valley of Hinnom westward, which is at the end of the valley of the giants northward:
And the border went out toward the sea to Michmethah on the north side; and the border went about eastward unto Taanath-shiloh, and passed by it on the east to Janohah;
And the south quarter was from the end of Kirjath-jearim, and the border went out on the west, and went out to the well of waters of Nephtoah:

And the border went up by the valley of the son of Hinnom unto the south side of the Jebusite; the same is Jerusalem: and the border went up to the top of the mountain that lieth before the valley of…
And the border compasseth it on the north side to Hannathon: and the outgoings thereof are in the valley of Jiphthah-el:
And the border was drawn from the top of the hill unto the fountain of the water of Nephtoah, and went out to the cities of mount Ephron; and the border was drawn to Baalah, which is Kirjath-jearim:

And the border went out unto the side of Ekron northward: and the border was drawn to Shicron, and passed along to mount Baalah, and went out unto Jabneel; and the goings out of the border were at the sea.
And the border compassed from Baalah westward unto mount Seir, and passed along unto the side of mount Jearim, which is Chesalon, on the north side, and went down to Beth-shemesh, and passed on to…
And the border was drawn from the top of the hill unto the fountain of the water of Nephtoah, and went out to the cities of mount Ephron; and the border was drawn to Baalah, which is Kirjath-jearim:
And the border went out unto the side of Ekron northward: and the border was drawn to Shicron, and passed along to mount Baalah, and went out unto Jabneel; and the goings out of the border were at…
And the west border was to the great sea, and the coast thereof. This is the coast of the children of Judah round about according to their families.
This then was the lot of the tribe of the children of Judah by their families; even to the border of Edom the wilderness of Zin southward was the uttermost part of the south coast.
¶ And unto Caleb the son of Jephunneh he gave a part among the children of Judah, according to the commandment of the Lord to Joshua, even the city of Arba the father of Anak, which city is Hebron.
And they gave Hebron unto Caleb, as Moses said: and he expelled thence the three sons of Anak.
And they gave them the city of Arba the father of Anak, which city is Hebron, in the hill country of Judah, with the suburbs thereof round about it.
And Joshua blessed him, and gave unto Caleb the son of Jephunneh Hebron for an inheritance.
Hebron therefore became the inheritance of Caleb the son of Jephunneh the Kenezite unto this day, because that he wholly followed the Lord God of Israel.
Of the tribe of Judah, Caleb the son of Jephunneh.
And Caleb drove thence the three sons of Anak, Sheshai, and Ahiman, and Talmai, the children of Anak.
¶ And unto Caleb the son of Jephunneh he gave a part among the children of Judah, according to the commandment of the Lord to Joshua, even the city of Arba the father of Anak, which city is Hebron.
And the sons of Caleb the son of Jephunneh; Iru, Elah, and Naam: and the sons of Elah, even Kenaz.
And Othniel the son of Kenaz, the brother of Caleb, took it: and he gave him Achsah his daughter to wife.
¶ Now the sons of Caleb the brother of Jerahmeel were, Mesha his firstborn, which was the father of Ziph; and the sons of Mareshah the father of Hebron.
And he went up thence to the inhabitants of Debir: and the name of Debir before was Kirjath-sepher.
And from thence he went against the inhabitants of Debir: and the name of Debir before was Kirjath-sepher:
And Dannah, and Kirjath-sannah, which is Debir,
And Bela the son of Beor reigned in Edom: and the name of his city was Dinhabah.
And Ethem was the son of Ahah.
And Ethem, being a descendant of Ahah, did obtain the kingdom; and he also did do that which was wicked in his days.
¶ And Caleb said, He that smiteth Kirjath-sepher, and taketh it, to him will I give Achsah my daughter to wife.
And Caleb said, He that smiteth Kirjath-sepher, and taketh it, to him will I give Achsah my daughter to wife.
And Othniel the son of Kenaz, Caleb’s younger brother, took it: and he gave him Achsah his daughter to wife.
And he said, Speak, I pray thee, unto Solomon the king, (for he will not say thee nay,) that he give me Abishag the Shunammite to wife.
Save Caleb the son of Jephunneh; he shall see it, and to him will I give the land that he hath trodden upon, and to his children, because he hath wholly followed the Lord.
And Othniel the son of Kenaz, the brother of Caleb, took it: and he gave him Achsah his daughter to wife.
And when the children of Israel cried unto the Lord, the Lord raised up a deliverer to the children of Israel, who delivered them, even Othniel the son of Kenaz, Caleb’s younger brother.
And the sons of Kenaz; Othniel, and Seraiah: and the sons of Othniel; Hathath.
And Caleb drove thence the three sons of Anak, Sheshai, and Ahiman, and Talmai, the children of Anak.
And it came to pass, as she came unto him, that she moved him to ask of her father a field: and she lighted off her ass; and Caleb said unto her, What wouldest thou?
And it came to pass, when she came to him, that she moved him to ask of her father a field: and she lighted from off her ass; and Caleb said unto her, What wilt thou?
And she said unto him, Give me a blessing: for thou hast given me a south land; give me also springs of water. And Caleb gave her the upper springs and the nether springs.
And David sent messengers, and took her; and she came in unto him, and he lay with her; for she was purified from her uncleanness: and she returned unto her house.
And she said unto Elijah, What have I to do with thee, O thou man of God? art thou come unto me to call my sin to remembrance, and to slay my son?
But my servant Caleb, because he had another spirit with him, and hath followed me fully, him will I bring into the land whereinto he went; and his seed shall possess it.
Who answered, Give me a blessing; for thou hast given me a south land; give me also springs of water. And he gave her the upper springs, and the nether springs.
That I will give you the rain of your land in his due season, the first rain and the latter rain, that thou mayest gather in thy corn, and thy wine, and thine oil.
Therefore thus saith the Lord; Behold, I will plead thy cause, and take vengeance for thee; and I will dry up her sea, and make her springs dry.

And I gave thee thy master’s house, and thy master’s wives into thy bosom, and gave thee the house of Israel and of Judah; and if that had been too little, I would moreover have given unto thee such and such things.

And gavest them bread from heaven for their hunger, and broughtest forth water for them out of the rock for their thirst, and promisedst them that they should go in to possess the land which thou hadst sworn to give them.
This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Judah according to their families.
This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Issachar according to their families, the cities and their villages.
¶ And Moses gave unto the tribe of the children of Reuben inheritance according to their families.

For the tribe of the children of Reuben according to the house of their fathers, and the tribe of the children of Gad according to the house of their fathers, have received their inheritance; and half the tribe of Manasseh have received their inheritance:
And all Judah stood before the Lord, with their little ones, their wives, and their children.

And if they be married to any of the sons of the other tribes of the children of Israel, then shall their inheritance be taken from the inheritance of our fathers, and shall be put to the inheritance of the tribe whereunto they are received: so shall it be taken from the lot of our inheritance.
And the uttermost cities of the tribe of the children of Judah toward the coast of Edom southward were Kabzeel, and Eder, and Jagur,

And for the villages, with their fields, some of the children of Judah dwelt at Kirjath-arba, and in the villages thereof, and at Dibon, and in the villages thereof, and at Jekabzeel, and in the villages thereof,
Now the cities of the tribe of the children of Benjamin according to their families were Jericho, and Beth-hoglah, and the valley of Keziz,
And the residue of the families of the sons of Kohath had cities of their coasts out of the tribe of Ephraim.
And Kinah, and Dimonah, and Adadah,
And Adamah, and Ramah, and Hazor,
And Adoraim, and Lachish, and Azekah,
And Jiphtah, and Ashnah, and Nezib,
And of the sons of Pahath-moab; Adna, and Chelal, Benaiah, Maaseiah, Mattaniah, Bezaleel, and Binnui, and Manasseh.
And Janum, and Beth-tappuah, and Aphekah,
And Kedesh, and Hazor, and Ithnan,
And Kedesh, and Edrei, and En-hazor,
And Jahazah, and Kedemoth, and Mephaath,
Hadar, and Tema, Jetur, Naphish, and Kedemah:
And Hazar-shual, and Balah, and Azem,
Ziph, and Telem, and Bealoth,
And Gath, and Mareshah, and Ziph,
Maon, Carmel, and Ziph, and Juttah,
And the sons of Jehaleleel; Ziph, and Ziphah, Tiria, and Asareel.
And Avim, and Parah, and Ophrah,
And Beth-peor, and Ashdoth-pisgah, and Beth-jeshimoth,
And Hazor, Hadattah, and Kerioth, and Hezron, which is Hazor,
And Kedesh, and Hazor, and Ithnan,
And Chesed, and Hazo, and Pildash, and Jidlaph, and Bethuel.
And Atroth, Shophan, and Jaazer, and Jogbehah,
And Ziklag, and Beth-marcaboth, and Hazar-susah,
Amam, and Shema, and Moladah,
And the sons of his brother Helem; Zophah, and Imna, and Shelesh, and Amal.
And Ahaz begat Jarah; and Jarah begat Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begat Moza;
And the sons of Hebron; Korah, and Tappuah, and Rekem, and Shema.
And Zanoah, and En-gannim, Tappuah, and Enam,
Shemaiah, and Joiarib, Jedaiah,
And Hazar-gaddah, and Heshmon, and Beth-palet,
And Eltolad, and Bethul, and Hormah,
And Hazar-shual, and Beer-sheba, and Bizjothjah,
And they dwelt at Beer-sheba, and Moladah, and Hazar-shual,
And at Hazar-shual, and at Beer-sheba, and in the villages thereof,
And Joktan begat Almodad, and Sheleph, and Hazarmaveth, and Jerah,
Baalah, and Iim, and Azem,
Jarmuth, and Adullam, Socoh, and Azekah,
Amam, and Shema, and Moladah,
And Zechariah, and Aziel, and Shemiramoth, and Jehiel, and Unni, and Eliab, and Maaseiah, and Benaiah, with psalteries on Alamoth;
And Eltolad, and Chesil, and Hormah,
And Mizpeh, and Chephirah, and Mozah,
And Hazar-gaddah, and Heshmon, and Beth-palet,
And Ziklag, and Madmannah, and Sansannah,
And Jezreel, and Jokdeam, and Zanoah,
And Lebaoth, and Shilhim, and Ain, and Rimmon: all the cities are twenty and nine, with their villages:
And their villages were, Etam, and Ain, Rimmon, and Tochen, and Ashan, five cities:
And Kattath, and Nahallal, and Shimron, and Idalah, and Beth-lehem: twelve cities with their villages.
And Beth-lebaoth, and Sharuhen; thirteen cities and their villages:
And Sharaim, and Adithaim, and Gederah, and Gederothaim; fourteen cities with their villages:
And Goshen, and Holon, and Giloh; eleven cities with their villages:
And in the valley, Eshtaol, and Zoreah, and Ashnah,
And Kirjathaim, and Sibmah, and Zareth-shahar in the mount of the valley,
And Abishua, and Naaman, and Ahoah,
And the sons of Jahdai; Regem, and Jotham, and Geshan, and Pelet, and Ephah, and Shaaph.
And the coast of their inheritance was Zorah, and Eshtaol, and Ir-shemesh,
And Zanoah, and En-gannim, Tappuah, and Enam,
And in the valley, Eshtaol, and Zoreah, and Ashnah,
And Remeth, and En-gannim, and En-haddah, and Beth-pazzez;
And Elon, and Thimnathah, and Ekron,
Jarmuth, and Adullam, Socoh, and Azekah,
The sons of Shobal; Alian, and Manahath, and Ebal, Shephi, and Onam. And the sons of Zibeon; Aiah, and Anah.
And Kinah, and Dimonah, and Adadah,
And of the sons of Bani; Meshullam, Malluch, and Adaiah, Jashub, and Sheal, and Ramoth.
And Sharaim, and Adithaim, and Gederah, and Gederothaim; fourteen cities with their villages:
And Gederoth, Beth-dagon, and Naamah, and Makkedah; sixteen cities with their villages:
And Chephar-haammonai, and Ophni, and Gaba; twelve cities with their villages:
Zenan, and Hadashah, and Migdal-gad,
And Ziklag, and Madmannah, and Sansannah,
Hadid, Zeboim, Neballat,
¶ And the sons of Gad; Ziphion, and Haggi, Shuni, and Ezbon, Eri, and Arodi, and Areli.
And Dilean, and Mizpeh, and Joktheel,
And Gedor, and Ahio, and Zechariah, and Mikloth.
And Mizraim begat Ludim, and Anamim, and Lehabim, and Naphtuhim,
Lachish, and Bozkath, and Eglon,
And Eltekeh, and Gibbethon, and Baalath,
Ataroth, and Dibon, and Jazer, and Nimrah, and Heshbon, and Elealeh, and Shebam, and Nebo, and Beon,
Eluzai, and Jerimoth, and Bealiah, and Shemariah, and Shephatiah the Haruphite,
And Cabbon, and Lahmam, and Kithlish,
And Shaalabbin, and Ajalon, and Jethlah,
And Gederoth, Beth-dagon, and Naamah, and Makkedah; sixteen cities with their villages:
And Maarath, and Beth-anoth, and Eltekon; six cities with their villages:
And Iron, and Migdal-el, Horem, and Beth-anath, and Beth-shemesh; nineteen cities with their villages.
Libnah, and Ether, and Ashan,
Ain, Remmon, and Ether, and Ashan; four cities and their villages:
And Ashan with her suburbs, and Beth-shemesh with her suburbs:
And they removed from Libnah, and pitched at Rissah.
And Ahijah, Hanan, Anan,
And Jiphtah, and Ashnah, and Nezib,
And Nogah, and Nepheg, and Japhia,
And Keilah, and Achzib, and Mareshah; nine cities with their villages:
Ummah also, and Aphek, and Rehob: twenty and two cities with their villages.
And Humtah, and Kirjath-arba, which is Hebron, and Zior; nine cities with their villages:
Ekron, with her towns and her villages:
Aijalon with her suburbs, Gath-rimmon with her suburbs; four cities.
And Aijalon with her suburbs, and Gath-rimmon with her suburbs:
From Ekron even unto the sea, all that lay near Ashdod, with their villages:
From Ekron even unto the sea, all that lay near Ashdod, with their villages:
And all the mingled people, and all the kings of the land of Uz, and all the kings of the land of the Philistines, and Ashkelon, and Azzah, and Ekron, and the remnant of Ashdod,
Ekron, with her towns and her villages:
Ashdod with her towns and her villages, Gaza with her towns and her villages, unto the river of Egypt, and the great sea, and the border thereof:
And the people journeyed from Kibroth-hattaavah unto Hazeroth; and abode at Hazeroth.

From Sihor, which is before Egypt, even unto the borders of Ekron northward, which is counted to the Canaanite: five lords of the Philistines; the Gazathites, and the Ashdothites, the Eshkalonites, the Gittites, and the Ekronites; also the Avites:
Ashdod with her towns and her villages, Gaza with her towns and her villages, unto the river of Egypt, and the great sea, and the border thereof:

¶ And their possessions and habitations were, Beth-el and the towns thereof, and eastward Naaran, and westward Gezer, with the towns thereof; Shechem also and the towns thereof, unto Gaza and the towns thereof:
Her cities are a desolation, a dry land, and a wilderness, a land wherein no man dwelleth, neither doth any son of man pass thereby.

Ashkelon shall see it, and fear; Gaza also shall see it, and be very sorrowful, and Ekron; for her expectation shall be ashamed; and the king shall perish from Gaza, and Ashkelon shall not be inhabited.
And by the borders of the children of Manasseh, Beth-shean and her towns, Taanach and her towns, Megiddo and her towns, Dor and her towns. In these dwelt the children of Joseph the son of Israel.
¶ And in the mountains, Shamir, and Jattir, and Socoh,
¶ And the sons of Zebulun; Sered, and Elon, and Jahleel.
¶ These are the sons of Seir the Horite, who inhabited the land; Lotan, and Shobal, and Zibeon, and Anah,
¶ And the sons of Izhar; Korah, and Nepheg, and Zichri.
And Dannah, and Kirjath-sannah, which is Debir,
And Eshton begat Beth-rapha, and Paseah, and Tehinnah the father of Ir-nahash. These are the men of Rechah.
And the sons of Cush; Seba, and Havilah, and Sabtah, and Raamah, and Sabtecha: and the sons of Raamah; Sheba, and Dedan.
And the sons of Cush; Seba, and Havilah, and Sabta, and Raamah, and Sabtecha. And the sons of Raamah; Sheba, and Dedan.
And Anab, and Eshtemoh, and Anim,
And Ebal, and Abimael, and Sheba,
And Ibhar, and Elishua, and Elpalet,
And Goshen, and Holon, and Giloh; eleven cities with their villages:
Arab, and Dumah, and Eshean,
And Beth-arabah, and Zemaraim, and Beth-el,
And Mishma, and Dumah, and Massa,
And of the sons of Pashur; Elioenai, Maaseiah, Ishmael, Nethaneel, Jozabad, and Elasah.
And Janum, and Beth-tappuah, and Aphekah,
And Beth-zur, and Shoco, and Adullam,
And Humtah, and Kirjath-arba, which is Hebron, and Zior; nine cities with their villages:
And Keilah, and Achzib, and Mareshah; nine cities with their villages:
And Nibshan, and the city of Salt, and En-gedi; six cities with their villages.
And Zorah, and Aijalon, and Hebron, which are in Judah and in Benjamin fenced cities.
Maon, Carmel, and Ziph, and Juttah,
Ziph, and Telem, and Bealoth,
And Jezreel, and Jokdeam, and Zanoah,
And Jakim, and Zichri, and Zabdi,
And Dilean, and Mizpeh, and Joktheel,
And Zebadiah, and Meshullam, and Hezeki, and Heber,
Cain, Gibeah, and Timnah; ten cities with their villages:

The Philistines also had invaded the cities of the low country, and of the south of Judah, and had taken Beth-shemesh, and Ajalon, and Gederoth, and Shocho with the villages thereof, and Timnah with the villages thereof, Gimzo also and the villages thereof: and they dwelt there.
Halhul, Beth-zur, and Gedor,
And Maarath, and Beth-anoth, and Eltekon; six cities with their villages:
Kirjath-baal, which is Kirjath-jearim, and Rabbah; two cities with their villages:
And Zelah, Eleph, and Jebusi, which is Jerusalem, Gibeath, and Kirjath; fourteen cities with their villages. This is the inheritance of the children of Benjamin according to their families.
In the wilderness, Beth-arabah, Middin, and Secacah,
Namely, Bezer in the wilderness, in the plain country, of the Reubenites; and Ramoth in Gilead, of the Gadites; and Golan in Bashan, of the Manassites.

And on the other side Jordan by Jericho eastward, they assigned Bezer in the wilderness upon the plain out of the tribe of Reuben, and Ramoth in Gilead out of the tribe of Gad, and Golan in Bashan out of the tribe of Manasseh.
And Baalath, and Tadmor in the wilderness, in the land,
These be the words which Moses spake unto all Israel on this side Jordan in the wilderness, in the plain over against the Red sea, between Paran, and Tophel, and Laban, and Hazeroth, and Dizahab.
And Nibshan, and the city of Salt, and En-gedi; six cities with their villages.
¶ As for the Jebusites the inhabitants of Jerusalem, the children of Judah could not drive them out: but the Jebusites dwell with the children of Judah at Jerusalem unto this day.
And the children of Benjamin did not drive out the Jebusites that inhabited Jerusalem; but the Jebusites dwell with the children of Benjamin in Jerusalem unto this day.
¶ And David and all Israel went to Jerusalem, which is Jebus; where the Jebusites were, the inhabitants of the land.
Thus the children of Israel were brought under at that time, and the children of Judah prevailed, because they relied upon the Lord God of their fathers.
And the children of Israel fled before Judah: and God delivered them into their hand.
But as for the children of Israel that dwelt in the cities of Judah, Rehoboam reigned over them.
